title: jasminum rupestre
intro: Jasminum rupestre, also known as the rock jasmine or climbing jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments including fever, headache, and digestive issues. The plant contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can provide health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Jasminum rupestre are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
